nodes.title: The PM Group’s Full Service Advertising Agency Offerings are the Driving Force Behind Our Client Growth
San Antonio IHOP to Aid Veterans and Their Families Throughout November
The Original Batmobile on Display at the San Antonio International Auto & Truck Show

pageContext.content:
Have you seen our latest client cross promotion?  IHOP and the San Antonio Auto and Truck Show have joined forces again to offer awesome savings to attend San Antonio’s coolest car event of the year.  From now until November 12th, San Antonio participating IHOP locations are offering $3 off coupons to get your tickets to the event.
The 49th annual San Antonio Auto and Truck show will take place at the Henry B Gonzalez Convention Center November 9-12th, and will feature the latest and greatest in automotive engineering. Brand new cars, trucks, and SUV’s will line the showroom floor, while electric and some autonomous cars will silently try to make some noise.  You’ll even get a chance to me Chuck from Street Outlaws.  Private meet and greet information can be found here (link to saautoshow.com).
Appetite for adventure? Got a craving for fast cars? Whatever the case, make your way into IHOP to satisfy your breakfast cravings and pick up a coupon to be able to see what car dealers have to offer with their 2018 models!
About The PM Group: The PM Group was founded in 1988. Over the past 30 years, the agency has continued to grow and is currently listed as San Antonio’s Largest Advertising Agency by the San Antonio Business Journal. The PM Group’s client roster spans numerous industries including automotive, CPG, entertainment and sports marketing, legal, business services, non-profit, real estate and fitness. In addition, the agency hosts an annual Charity Gala every February that to date has raised over $2.5 million for local San Antonio area non-profit organizations in the last 15 years! It is our way of giving back to the community that we so humbly serve.
